name: EKS Cluster
description: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service managed cluster with full configuration support

inputs.name: cluster_name
inputs.label: Cluster Name
inputs.description: Name of the EKS cluster

inputs.name: cluster_version
inputs.label: Kubernetes Version
inputs.description: Kubernetes version for the cluster

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: VPC where the cluster will be deployed

inputs.name: control_plane_subnet_ids
inputs.label: Control Plane Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Subnet IDs for EKS control plane ENIs (typically private subnets)

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Node Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs for node groups (if different from control plane)

inputs.name: cluster_endpoint_public_access
inputs.label: Public API Endpoint
inputs.description: Enable public API server endpoint

inputs.name: cluster_endpoint_private_access
inputs.label: Private API Endpoint
inputs.description: Enable private API server endpoint

inputs.name: cluster_endpoint_public_access_cidrs
inputs.label: Public Access CIDRs
inputs.description: Comma-separated CIDRs that can access the public API endpoint

inputs.name: manage_aws_auth_configmap
inputs.label: Manage aws-auth ConfigMap
inputs.description: Manage the aws-auth configmap for RBAC mappings

inputs.name: enable_cluster_creator_admin_permissions
inputs.label: Creator Admin Access
inputs.description: Give cluster creator admin permissions via access entry

inputs.name: cluster_enabled_log_types
inputs.label: Control Plane Log Types
inputs.description: Comma-separated control plane log types (leave empty for none)

inputs.name: cluster_addons
inputs.label: Cluster Addons
inputs.description: EKS cluster addons configuration (coredns, kube-proxy, vpc-cni, etc.)

inputs.name: kms_key_administrators
inputs.label: KMS Key Administrators
inputs.description: IAM ARNs that can administer the KMS encryption key (one per line)

inputs.name: kms_key_users
inputs.label: KMS Key Users
inputs.description: IAM ARNs that can use the KMS encryption key (one per line)

inputs.name: node_security_group_enable_recommended_rules
inputs.label: Enable Recommended Node SG Rules
inputs.description: Enable recommended security group rules for node communication

inputs.name: node_security_group_additional_rules
inputs.label: Node Security Group Additional Rules
inputs.description: Additional security group rules for the node group

inputs.name: node_security_group_tags
inputs.label: Node Security Group Tags
inputs.description: Additional tags for the node security group (e.g. Karpenter discovery)

inputs.name: node_desired_size
inputs.label: Node Desired Size
inputs.description: Desired number of nodes in each managed node group

inputs.name: node_min_size
inputs.label: Node Min Size
inputs.description: Minimum number of nodes in each managed node group

inputs.name: node_max_size
inputs.label: Node Max Size
inputs.description: Maximum number of nodes in each managed node group

inputs.name: node_instance_types
inputs.label: Node Instance Types
inputs.description: EC2 instance type for the node group

inputs.name: node_capacity_type
inputs.label: Capacity Type
inputs.description: Capacity type for the node group (ON_DEMAND or SPOT)

inputs.name: node_ami_type
inputs.label: AMI Type
inputs.description: AMI type for the node group

inputs.name: node_disk_size
inputs.label: Node Disk Size (GB)
inputs.description: Disk size in GB for each node

inputs.name: eks_managed_node_group_defaults
inputs.label: Node Group Extra Config
inputs.description: Additional default configuration for managed node groups (IAM policies, block devices, etc.)

inputs.name: eks_managed_node_groups
inputs.label: Managed Node Groups
inputs.description: Custom node group definitions (overrides defaults above). Leave empty to use a single default node group.

inputs.name: authentication_mode
inputs.label: Authentication Mode
inputs.description: Cluster authentication mode

inputs.name: enable_irsa
inputs.label: IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts)
inputs.description: Create OIDC provider for IAM roles for service accounts

inputs.name: create_kms_key
inputs.label: Create KMS Key
inputs.description: Create a KMS key for cluster encryption

inputs.name: enable_kms_key_rotation
inputs.label: KMS Key Rotation
inputs.description: Enable automatic KMS key rotation

inputs.name: create_cloudwatch_log_group
inputs.label: CloudWatch Log Group
inputs.description: Create CloudWatch log group for control plane logs

inputs.name: cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days
inputs.label: Log Retention (days)
inputs.description: CloudWatch log group retention period in days

inputs.name: create_cluster_security_group
inputs.label: Create Cluster SG
inputs.description: Create a security group for the cluster

inputs.name: create_node_security_group
inputs.label: Create Node SG
inputs.description: Create a shared security group for node groups

inputs.name: ip_family
inputs.label: IP Family
inputs.description: IP family for Kubernetes pod and service addresses

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.label: Deletion Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental cluster deletion

inputs.name: aws_auth_roles
inputs.label: aws-auth Roles
inputs.description: IAM roles to map into the aws-auth configmap

inputs.name: aws_auth_users
inputs.label: aws-auth Users
inputs.description: IAM users to map into the aws-auth configmap
